texts.text: LOCATION: Dhanjay Apartments #404, Valley Arcade, Lavington

texts.label: text
texts.orig: THE FOLLOWING AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED BETWEEN THE ABOVE MENTIONED AND ELANGATA OLERAI CAMP.
texts.text: THE FOLLOWING AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED BETWEEN THE ABOVE MENTIONED AND ELANGATA OLERAI CAMP.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4- 12 Yrs. sharing - 1 child sharing 2 adults - 50% of Per Person rate
texts.text: 4- 12 Yrs. sharing - 1 child sharing 2 adults - 50% of Per Person rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4- 12 Yrs. - 2 children sharing with 1 Adult - 50% of half dbl room rate per child
texts.text: 4- 12 Yrs. - 2 children sharing with 1 Adult - 50% of half dbl room rate per child

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4 -12 Yrs. - 1 child sharing with 1 adult - 50% of room rate + single room rate
texts.text: 4 -12 Yrs. - 1 child sharing with 1 adult - 50% of room rate + single room rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4- 12 Yrs. - 2 children in own room 75% of room rate
texts.text: 4- 12 Yrs. - 2 children in own room 75% of room rate

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A Christmas supplement of US$ 35 per adult & US$25 per child per day will apply on 24, 25, 26 and 31st Dec and 1st Jan 202 6
texts.text: A Christmas supplement of US$ 35 per adult & US$25 per child per day will apply on 24, 25, 26 and 31st Dec and 1st Jan 202 6

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Full day game drives US$ 300 per vehicle
texts.text: Full day game drives US$ 300 per vehicle

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Half day Game drive US$ 200 per vehicle
texts.text: Half day Game drive US$ 200 per vehicle

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Maximum single rooms to be allocated per group 2-4, extra single rooms to be charged at full Double rate.
texts.text: Maximum single rooms to be allocated per group 2-4, extra single rooms to be charged at full Double rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) For bookings cancelled  or reduced  in  numbers  between 45  and  35 days  from  date of arrival,  25% of the contract rate will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings cancelled  or reduced  in  numbers  between 45  and  35 days  from  date of arrival,  25% of the contract rate will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) For  bookings  cancelled  or  reduced  in  numbers  between  34  and  8  days  from  date  of  arrival,  50%  of  the contract rate will be charged
texts.text: For  bookings  cancelled  or  reduced  in  numbers  between  34  and  8  days  from  date  of  arrival,  50%  of  the contract rate will be charged

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) In the case of cancellation within 7 days of arrival date, or in case of a 'No show' 100% of the value of booking will be charged.
texts.text: In the case of cancellation within 7 days of arrival date, or in case of a 'No show' 100% of the value of booking will be charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A non-refundable cash deposit of 50% is payable upon confirmation of booking within 7 days and the balance 21 days prior to the arrival of clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.
texts.text: A non-refundable cash deposit of 50% is payable upon confirmation of booking within 7 days and the balance 21 days prior to the arrival of clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Credit card payments will attract a 5% Bank processing fees. Payments by cheque must be paid 7 days before the arrival of the clients. In the event the cheque is returned by the Bank as unpaid for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof. The agent agrees to pay any costs including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Elangata Olerai Camp in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default payment.
texts.text: Credit card payments will attract a 5% Bank processing fees. Payments by cheque must be paid 7 days before the arrival of the clients. In the event the cheque is returned by the Bank as unpaid for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof. The agent agrees to pay any costs including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Elangata Olerai Camp in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default payment.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Operator confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
texts.text: The Operator confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The contractual rate stated in this agreement is subject to change without any prior notice. However every effort will be made to maintain them, in case of a change in Government Taxes or Levies affecting the rates stated herein, Elangata Olerai reserves the right to pass on any increase to the Tour Operator
texts.text: The contractual rate stated in this agreement is subject to change without any prior notice. However every effort will be made to maintain them, in case of a change in Government Taxes or Levies affecting the rates stated herein, Elangata Olerai reserves the right to pass on any increase to the Tour Operator

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Elangata Olerai will not accept responsibility for any accident of any nature involving any client(s) Within the camp premises or while traveling to/from the camp.
texts.text: Elangata Olerai will not accept responsibility for any accident of any nature involving any client(s) Within the camp premises or while traveling to/from the camp.
